```{r ed-fig4-distiller-ablation, fig.width=7.09, fig.height=9.45}
                       midpoint = 0.55, limits = c(0, 1), name = "Retention (%)",
                       labels = pct100) +
  labs(title = "a",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_nmi() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.key.height = unit(0.3, "cm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(0.6, "cm"))

# --- Panel b: Source retention heatmap ---
ed4b <- abl_summary |>
  ggplot(aes(x = variant, y = model_display, fill = mean_sr)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", mean_sr * 100)),
            size = 2.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = col_bad, mid = col_mid, high = col_good,
                       midpoint = 0.55, limits = c(0, 1), name = "Retention (%)",
                       labels = pct100) +
  labs(title = "b",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_nmi() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.key.height = unit(0.3, "cm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(0.6, "cm"))

# --- Panel c: Marginal improvement over baseline (pooled across models) ---
marginal <- abl_summary |>
  filter(variant != "baseline") |>
  group_by(variant) |>
  summarise(
    mean_delta_nr = mean(delta_nr, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_delta_nr = sd(delta_nr, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    mean_delta_sr = mean(delta_sr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

marginal_long <- marginal |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_delta_nr, mean_delta_sr),
               names_to = "metric", values_to = "delta") |>
  mutate(metric = ifelse(metric == "mean_delta_nr", "Number retention", "Source retention"))

ed4c <- marginal_long |>
  ggplot(aes(x = variant, y = delta, fill = metric)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey30") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%+.1f", delta * 100),
                vjust = ifelse(delta >= 0, -0.5, 1.3)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), size = 2.3, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Number retention" = col_info, "Source retention" = col_good),
                    name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) sprintf("%+.0f", x * 100)) +
  labs(title = "c",
       x = "Prompt variant", y = "Change from baseline (pp)") +
  theme_nmi() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key.size = unit(3, "mm"))

# --- Compose ---
ed_fig4 <- ed4a / ed4b / ed4c +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(
    theme = theme_nmi() + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold", margin = margin(b = 4)))
  )

ed_fig4
save_figure(ed_fig4, "ed_fig5_distiller_ablation", w = 180, h = 170)
```

---

# Extended Data Figure 3 — Strategy Replication Across Models

**Purpose**: Show that strategy rankings generalise to capable non-Gemini models (122B)
but invert with smaller models (32B), demonstrating capability-gated RLM benefit.

```{r ed-fig6-strategy-replication, fig.width=7.09, fig.height=7}
# --- Load replication data ---
rep_122b <- safe_load(file.path(results_dir, "deep_analyses/reviewer_strategy_replication_122b.json"))
rep_32b  <- safe_load(file.path(results_dir, "deep_analyses/reviewer_strategy_replication.json"))
has_replication <- !is.null(rep_122b) && !is.null(rep_32b)

if (has_replication) {
  # Build combined data from pre-computed metrics
  strat_order <- c("single_pass", "rlm_10", "verified_pass")
  strat_labels <- c(single_pass = "Single Pass", rlm_10 = "RLM-10", verified_pass = "Verified Pass")

  build_model_df <- function(metrics, model_label) {
    map_dfr(names(metrics), function(cfg) {
      m <- metrics[[cfg]]
      tibble(
        model = model_label,
        config = cfg,
        pass_rate = m$pass_rate,
        refusal_rate = m$refusal_rate,
        mean_correctness = m$mean_correctness
      )
    })
  }

  rep_data <- bind_rows(
    build_model_df(rep_122b$gemini_metrics, "gemini-3-flash"),
    build_model_df(rep_122b$qwen3_metrics, "qwen3.5:122b"),
    build_model_df(rep_32b$qwen3_metrics, "qwen3-coder:30b")
  ) |>
    filter(config %in% strat_order) |>
    mutate(
      config = factor(config, levels = strat_order),
      config_label = factor(strat_labels[as.character(config)], levels = strat_labels),
      model = factor(model, levels = c("gemini-3-flash", "qwen3.5:122b", "qwen3-coder:30b"))
    )

  model_rep_palette <- c("gemini-3-flash" = "grey40",
                          "qwen3.5:122b" = col_info,
                          "qwen3-coder:30b" = col_bad)

  # Spearman annotations
  rho_122b <- rep_122b$ranking_comparison$spearman_rho
  rho_32b  <- rep_32b$ranking_comparison$spearman_rho

  # --- Panel a: Pass rate (answerable) ---
  ed6a <- rep_data |>
    ggplot(aes(x = config_label, y = pass_rate / 100, fill = model)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", pass_rate)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), vjust = -0.4,
              size = 2.3, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = model_rep_palette, name = NULL) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = pct100, limits = c(0, 1.05)) +
    labs(title = "a",
         x = NULL, y = "Pass rate (%)") +
    theme_nmi() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.key.size = unit(3, "mm"))

  # --- Panel b: OOD refusal rate ---
  ed6b <- rep_data |>
    ggplot(aes(x = config_label, y = refusal_rate / 100, fill = model)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", refusal_rate)),
              position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), vjust = -0.4,
              size = 2.3, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = model_rep_palette, name = NULL) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = pct100, limits = c(0, 1.05)) +
    labs(title = "b",
         x = NULL, y = "Refusal rate (%)") +
    theme_nmi() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.key.size = unit(3, "mm"))

  # --- Compose ---
  ed_fig6 <- ed6a / ed6b +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1), guides = "collect") +
    plot_annotation(
      theme = theme_nmi() + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold", margin = margin(b = 4)))
    ) &
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  ed_fig6
  save_figure(ed_fig6, "ed_fig3_strategy_replication", w = 180, h = 170)
} else {
  cat("Strategy replication data not available.\n")
}
```

---

# Extended Data Figure 2 — Contradictory OOD Response Classification {.tabset}

```{r ed-fig7-ood-contradictory, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
ood_verif <- fromJSON(here::here("publication", "results", "deep_analyses",
                                  "reviewer_ood_manual_verification.json"))
ood_cfg <- ood_verif$summary_per_config

ood_stacked <- tibble(
  config = names(ood_cfg),
  refused      = map_int(ood_cfg, ~ .x$refused),
  contradicted = map_int(ood_cfg, ~ .x$contradicted),
  hedged       = map_int(ood_cfg, ~ .x$hedged)
) |>
  mutate(
    n = refused + contradicted + hedged,
    config_label = factor(config_labels[config], levels = config_labels)
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(c(refused, contradicted, hedged),
               names_to = "outcome", values_to = "count") |>
  mutate(
    frac = count / n,
    outcome = factor(outcome,
                     levels = c("hedged", "contradicted", "refused"),
                     labels = c("Hedged", "Contradicted", "Refused"))
  )

ood_outcome_pal <- c("Refused" = "#0072B2", "Contradicted" = "#009E73", "Hedged" = "#E69F00")

ed_fig7 <- ood_stacked |>
  ggplot(aes(x = config_label, y = frac, fill = outcome)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, position = "stack") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(count > 0, count, "")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ood_outcome_pal, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = pct100, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion (%)") +
  theme_nmi() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key.size = unit(0.35, "cm")) +
  plot_annotation(
    subtitle = "Manual verification of 60 responses to 10 false-premise questions (0 affirmed false claims)",
    theme = theme_nmi() + theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold", margin = margin(b = 4)),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 7, color = "grey40")
    )
  )

ed_fig7
save_figure(ed_fig7, "ed_fig2_ood_contradictory", w = 120, h = 100)
```

---

# Summary: Output Files

```{r summary}
output_files <- list.files(fig_dir, pattern = paste0("\\.", params$format, "$"), full.names = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("\n%d figure files generated in %s/:\n\n", length(output_files), fig_dir))
for (f in sort(output_files)) {
  info <- file.info(f)
  cat(sprintf("  %s  (%.1f KB)\n", basename(f), info$size / 1024))
}
cat(sprintf("\nFormat: %s | Resolution: %d dpi | Width: %d mm\n",
            toupper(params$format), params$dpi, params$width_mm))
```
